message:
refactor: idiomatic Rust patterns and lint cleanup

bubbletea_integration.rs:
- Use let-chains (if-let && condition) for Tab key handling
- Use Duration::from_mins(1) instead of from_secs(60)
- Simplify update() return by removing intermediate binding

theme.rs (tests):
- Remove unnecessary .to_string() calls on render() output
- Use inline format in assert! macros ({rendered:?} instead of {:?}, rendered)
- Remove redundant assert!(true, ...) - test passes implicitly if no panic

All changes suggested by Clippy lints. No functional changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
